form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (38.38) when fourth over 660m at Ballarat in a Restricted WIN. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 4th on April 1 over 600m at this track behind Brute Force beaten 6 lengths (34.96) in a Grade 4/5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.
